recommendation: A serious, illustrated history of how next-token prediction became a computing interface, from embeddings and Transformers to ChatGPT, Claude Code, GPUs, datacenters, inference economics, and trust.
rationale: Keeps the commercial hook specific to LLMs and computing rather than generic AI futurism.

next_action: Use this as jacket/agent-query spine only after final structural map is settled.

recommendation: Every age of computing gets a new command surface. Ours arrived as a box of text that could answer, invent, hallucinate, code, search, call tools, and ask for more power. Next Token tells the story of how that happened.
rationale: Opens with reader recognition and book-level thesis without claims about sales, reviews, or outcomes.
blockers_or_constraints: KDP descriptions cannot include reviews, testimonials, price, availability, promotional dates, or keyword stuffing.
next_action: Use as draft jacket opening; trim after final manuscript voice pass.

recommendation: A deeply sourced narrative history of large language models through May 24, 2026, Next Token follows the race from early language modeling, word embeddings, attention, and scaling laws to GPT-3, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, Claude Code, benchmarks, CUDA, GTC 2026, datacenters, data, inference economics, and trust. It is a book about language becoming operational: a prompt becoming an interface, code becoming a work loop, and compute becoming a product readers can buy by the token.
rationale: Says what is in the book and why it matters; keeps cutoff visible.
blockers_or_constraints: Must not imply all named labs are equally supported; Chapter 12 and unsupported frontier lanes remain structurally sensitive.
next_action: Revise after Chapter 12 slot conflict and source-density repairs.

recommendation: Readers will leave understanding why LLMs felt sudden, why they were not magic, why hardware and power mattered, why rankings and prices mislead, and why the final question is judgment rather than inevitability.
rationale: Translates technical scope into purchase value for serious nonfiction readers.
blockers_or_constraints: Do not promise investment advice, productivity gains, future prediction, or definitive AGI answer.
next_action: Use in sell sheet and query copy.

recommendation: Smart general nonfiction readers, software engineers, technology/business strategy readers, AI practitioners, and book-world readers who liked serious technology history.
